## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff call to define Elementum's messaging and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Differentiator:** Elementum provides a deterministic workflow engine to govern probabilistic AI agents, solving the "agents gone wild" problem for CIOs and ensuring reliable, auditable enterprise processes.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Arm the new sales team with content assets (use cases, battle cards) to support deals. SEO and brand awareness are secondary, longer-term priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Adopt a confident, bold tone (like IBM) but avoid attacking legacy vendors (e.g., ServiceNow, Pega). The initial focus is on making existing systems better, not on direct replacement.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
  - [**Key Use Cases:** ITSM (service requests, incident mgmt) and Procurement (PR/PO mgmt) are the top priorities. The Sanofi case study (saving $10M) is a powerful proof point, but its use is currently restricted.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: "Agents Gone Wild"

  - [CIOs face chaos from hundreds or thousands of unmanaged agents, creating unreliable, inconsistent, and unscalable processes.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Example:** An agent promising an unauthorized discount, leading to a legal loss for a Canadian airline.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Core Misconception:** The belief that probabilistic agents can handle all enterprise workflows, including critical finance or HR processes where outcomes must be 100% reliable.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

### Elementum's Solution: Deterministic Workflow Orchestration

  - [**Core Principle:** Agents are a component of the workflow, not the workflow itself.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Platform:** A deterministic workflow engine (4 years in development, 20k+ capabilities) orchestrates agents, rules, and humans.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Future-Proofing:** The platform is open and model-agnostic, allowing customers to swap agents as AI evolves without rebuilding core business logic.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [**Data Strategy:** Workflows run where the data lives (e.g., Snowflake), eliminating data movement, integration work, and compliance headaches.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Target Audience & Sales Cycle

  - [**Primary Buyer:** CIOs, driven by the need for a control plane for their agent landscape.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Secondary Buyer:** Heads of AI.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [**Influencer:** Chief Data Officers (CDOs), who value Elementum's data-at-rest approach.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Sales Cycle:** 4-week pilot → 6–9 month enterprise sales cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)

### Competitive Landscape & Messaging

  - [**Legacy Vendors (ServiceNow, Pega):** AI is an afterthought; their engines are 20–30 years old and built for human-centric ticketing.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [**Agentic Platforms (Anthropic, Microsoft):** Offer agent management but lack a deterministic workflow engine, requiring heavy custom coding to achieve enterprise reliability.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [**Messaging Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
      - [**Tone:** Confident and bold (like IBM), but not arrogant or attacking.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=3075.0)
      - [**Initial Focus:** Position Elementum as a way to make existing legacy systems better, not as a direct replacement.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)
      - [**Long-Term Goal:** Plant a flag for the "SaaS-pocalypse" by showcasing real-world replacements (e.g., Sanofi replacing Coupa and Viva).](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=2648.0)

### Content & Customer Storytelling

  - [**Top Use Cases:**](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
      - [**ITSM:** Service requests, incident management.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Procurement:** Purchase request/order management.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**CRM:** (3rd priority)](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Sanofi Case Study:** Saved $10M with software license management, leading to a larger CRM replacement project.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [**Status:** Use is restricted due to a pending $18M upsell and minor performance issues being resolved.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=3351.0)
  - [**Other Key Customers:** Under Armour, Hermes, Snowflake, Elevance Health.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=3291.0)
      - [**Hermes:** Cannot be used for marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)
      - [**Snowflake:** Use is less credible due to their investment in Elementum.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=3335.0)
      - [**Elevance Health:** Use is restricted due to a pending upsell.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=3393.0)

      - [Provide a list of vendors Elementum replaces.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=3449.0)
      - [Schedule a product deep dive with Kay Westwood (Product) and Andrew for **Wednesday, Feb 18th, at 10:00 AM Pacific**.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=3470.0)
      - [Send a follow-up summary of key points to Andrew.](https://fathom.video/share/terd7XotKWzjwmXi6FfoKt_M3ZCYWJPr?tab=summary&timestamp=3449.0)
